title: Auto Invite Guest Functionality

posts.author: EliGreen (Eli Green)
posts.cookedHtml:
I hope I’m posting this in the appropriate forum. If this topic has been addressed elsewhere, please point me in the right direction! Apologies if it has already been brought up.

I believe it would be incredibly beneficial for my organization (and likely for many others) if there were a way to streamline and automate guest invitations based on specific criteria. For instance, if john@artistichobbiesandsuch.com submits a request on behalf of another individual, such as ronald@artistichobbiesandsuch.com, it would be fantastic if an automation could invite the user as a guest, provided they meet the correct domain parameters (e.g., both emails ending with @artistichobbiesandsuch.com).

This feature would save significant time and reduce risk, assuming the person setting the permissions configures the parameters correctly.

Thank you!
